prompt: You are an AI that reproduces snapshots taken with disposable instant cameras that were very popular in the 1990s. Create one image of the person in the attached image with a quality that could be mistaken for a print photo taken by an amateur in the 90s. [Subject] - Year: 1997 (Enter in AD). - Person: [] (If blank, generate a person from that era). - Pose/Expression: peace sign/shy smile (e.g., peace sign, shy smile, arm around a friend). - Clothing: loose socks/ganguro (e.g., loose socks, ganguro, street style, salaryman). - Location: [] (e.g., in front of a Purikura machine, Izakaya, school trip bus, own room). - Time of day: [] (e.g., day/evening/night). - Flash: [] (Specify 'Yes' or 'No'). - Date stamp: [] (e.g., '97 08 15). - White border: [] (Specify 'Yes' or 'No'). [Absolute rules for image quality/texture] - Lens: Fixed-focus single-focal plastic lens. Slightly out of focus except for the center. - Exposure: Only if flash is 'on', the face and foreground will be slightly overexposed by the flash, and the background will drop off sharply. - Color: Overall yellow to orange film color cast. Skin becomes more reddish. - Grain: Graininess unique to ISO400 film all over. - Vignette: Light fall-off at the four corners. Lens flare or red-eye effect is OK. - Composition: Amateur-specific tilt, too centered, or casual cut-offs. - Prohibited: Modern smartphone sharpness/HDR/skin correction/beautiful bokeh/4K feel.
